DP.097.0000:
Oh, thank goodness that you happened
to be there!\f
If it weren’t for you, who knows how
far away my BUNEARY could have run...\f
DP.097.0001:
Baby BUNEARY, back into the Poké
Ball you go!\f
DP.097.0002:
I’m Keira!
I’m a Pokémon Contest Judge.\f
Please drop by the Contest Hall
so I can thank you properly!\f
DP.097.0003:
Oh, I’m so sorry!
Please excuse me.\f
Are you entering a Contest?
Tehehe... Enjoy yourself, please!\f
Incidentally, Fantina, the Hearthome
Gym Leader, also happens to be\r
a Contest expert.\f
And you may ask yourself, how do
I know this? Well, I am Fantina!\f
You may challenge me, but not yet!
You must become much stronger.\r
Then, you may challenge me!\f
DP.097.0004:
[0103,0000]: Ta-daah!
Kept me waiting again, [0103,0001]!\f
Let’s see how much tougher you and
I have gotten, right here and now!\f
Hey, you’re a Trainer now. You’re
expected to be ready for a battle.\f
No whining! No waiting!
Let’s get the show started!\f
DP.097.0005:
[0103,0000]: Waaaagh!
You KO’d my team again?!\f
This messes up my dream of becoming
the greatest Trainer ever...\f
No! I just need to get tougher and
keep winning. One day...\f
That’s it! I’m going to challenge
the Veilstone Gym next!\f
See you around, [0103,0001]!\f
You’ll be blown away by how much
tougher I’ll be next time we meet!\f
DP.097.0006:
You’re kidding! They found an Egg at
the Day Care in Solaceon Town?
DP.097.0007:
I hear they found Eggs in the Johto
region, too.
DP.097.0008:
Cynthia: I’m so glad to see you!
You’re not very easy to track down.\f
My grandma told me about what took
place in Celestic Town.\f
Thanks for what you did in the ruins!\f
DP.097.0009:
But that Team Galactic...\f
I thought they were just an
eccentric bunch of freaks...\f
You know, talking about how they’re
going to make a new universe and all.\f
And that weird way they dress, too.
I thought they were harmless.\f
It appears as if they’re a lot more
trouble than I thought...\f
I mean, stealing and hoarding
Pokémon... That’s just plain wrong.\f
DP.097.0010:
By the way, did you find the ruins
interesting at all?\f
If you did, you may want to visit the
library in Canalave City.\f
They have some ancient books that
you might find interesting.\f
It may also be of help to the
completion of your Pokédex.\f
I think you ought to go there.
OK, bye-bye for now!\f
DP.097.0011:
You’re a Trainer, are you?\f
You’ve got two choices of challenges,
either the Gym or a Contest, right?
DP.097.0012:
I was given the HM Strength at
the Lost Tower.\f
The Lost Tower is on Route 209 on
the way to Solaceon Town.
DP.097.0014:
There are just so many Accessories
to dress up Pokémon with.\f
I can’t decide what I should use.
DP.097.0015:
I get to see Pokémon all day long,
but there sure are many kinds.\f
How many are there now?
DP.097.0016:
I used a Water Stone on my Pokémon,
and it evolved!
DP.097.0017:
I’m visiting here all the way from
the Hoenn region.\f
I had been hoping to find the Contest
Hall, but being new, I lost my way.\f
Fortunately, the local people very
kindly led me to my destination.\f
I was impressed by their kindness and
generosity to a complete stranger.\f
Now, may I offer you the courtesy
of showing you to the Contest Hall?
DP.097.0019:
This is the Contest Hall.
Please, do go inside.
DP.097.0020:
It makes me happy knowing I’ve
helped another person.
DP.097.0021:
Oh, I do apologize.
I should mind my own business.
DP.097.0022:
When I take my baby out in his stroller,
I see the town in a different way.\f
I notice things like stairs and bumps
in the sidewalk.
DP.097.0024:
I went for a stroll in Amity Square
with my PACHIRISU today.\f
We came across a Pokémon feather
while we walked.\f
Do you think it’d make my PACHIRISU
look any cuter?
DP.097.0026:
Hi, hi.
Do you want a Pokémon Egg?\f
They found this at the Day Care in
Solaceon Town...\f
Want to take it?
DP.097.0028:
This is what I heard about Eggs.\f
If you take that Egg and travel
with energetic Pokémon, it’ll hatch.\f
I remember someone announced that...
Professor Elm of Johto maybe?
DP.097.0029:
Hold up. You don’t seem to have
enough room for the Egg.
DP.097.0030:
All right, then. I’ll just keep waiting
for someone to take care of this Egg.\f
Oh? Wait a minute. If I wait around,
will the Egg hatch for me?
DP.097.0031:
They call me Mr. Goods.\f
No one knows my real name.
No, not even I do...\f
I dedicate myself to seeking rarities.
It’s what I live for.\f
DP.097.0034:
I was going to give you something,
but I just gave a rare thing away.\f
I’ll find something else for you,
so just talk to me some other time.
DP.097.0037:
Oh? Your underground PC appears
to be full.\f
I’ll hold your gift until you make
room for it. Tell me when, OK?
DP.097.0039:
I’ll find something rare for you,
so talk to me some other time.
DP.097.0040:
Oh!
How impressive!\f
Your adventure has gone global in
scale, has it?\f
For a Trainer like you, I have just
the thing!\f
DP.097.0041:
Oh!
How impressive!\f
You’ve conquered all the Gyms,
have you?\f
For a Trainer like you, I have just
the thing!\f
DP.097.0042:
Oh!
How impressive!\f
You’ve finally conquered the Master
Rank of the Cute Contest!\f
For a Trainer like you, I have just
the thing!\f
DP.097.0043:
Oh!
How impressive!\f
You’ve finally conquered the Master
Rank of the Cool Contest!\f
For a Trainer like you, I have just
the thing!\f
DP.097.0044:
Oh!
How impressive!\f
You’ve finally conquered the Master
Rank of the Beauty Contest!\f
For a Trainer like you, I have just
the thing!\f
DP.097.0045:
Oh!
How impressive!\f
You’ve finally conquered the Master
Rank of the Tough Contest!\f
For a Trainer like you, I have just
the thing!\f
DP.097.0046:
Oh!
How impressive!\f
You’ve finally conquered the Master
Rank of the Smart Contest!\f
For a Trainer like you, I have just
the thing!\f
DP.097.0047:
Oh!
How impressive!\f
You’ve met so very many people
in the underground tunnels!\f
For a Trainer like you, I have just
the thing!\f
DP.097.0048:
Oh!
How impressive!\f
You’ve given away many items to
people while underground!\f
For a Trainer like you, I have just
the thing!\f
DP.097.0049:
Oh!
How impressive!\f
You’ve dug up so many Fossils in
the underground tunnels!\f
For a Trainer like you, I have just
the thing!\f
DP.097.0050:
Oh!
How impressive!\f
You’ve set many Traps in the
underground tunnels!\f
For a Trainer like you, I have just
the thing!\f
DP.097.0051:
Oh!
How impressive!\f
You’ve finally beaten 10 Trainers in
a row at the Battle Tower!\f
For a Trainer like you, I have just
the thing!\f
DP.097.0052:
Oh!
How impressive!\f
You’ve finally beaten 50 Trainers in
a row at the Battle Tower!\f
For a Trainer like you, I have just
the thing!\f
DP.097.0053:
Oh!
How incredible!\f
You’ve finally beaten 100 Trainers in
a row at the Battle Tower!\f
For a Trainer like you, I have just
the thing!\f
DP.097.0054:
I can feel the baby stroller getting
heavier each and every day.\f
I wonder what kind of Pokémon my
child will become friends with first?
DP.097.0056:
I lived in total seclusion up in
the mountains for thirty years!\f
I’m going to clean up some Contests
with a dance move I came up with!
DP.097.0057:
I’d like to live in Hearthome when
I get married.\f
But my boyfriend wants to live in
Veilstone ’cause of its Game Corner...
DP.097.0059:
Hearthome City Pokémon Gym
Leader: Fantina\r
The Alluring, Soulful Dancer!
